lastReleaseMessage: v0.13.0: Plaid Phase 2 webhook relay (Cloudflare Worker, metadata-only per D-010) + scheduled localhost drain; SQLCipher at-rest (Wave 6) keyed from OS keystore; D-008..D-012 promoted into DECISIONS.md.

barRaise.topFinding: The 06-07 contingency fired. That report moved the verdict two tiers off stalled on the strength of a cleared .git/index.lock and pre-registered the regression: if the next cycle still shows e6cac08, this regresses. HEAD is still e6cac08 (2026-05-29), now ten days cold, and in the same window the uncommitted tree grew a second feature cohort on top of the v0.11.0 polish: a round-2 backend surface of ten /api/insights/* endpoints backed by a new apps/api/src/analytics/insights.ts, a web client, and three new docs, pushing server.ts from 63 to 73 routes (verified this run). The pile crossed a line it had not crossed before: it now holds un-recreatable backend feature source, not just regenerable reports, so a single stray clobber on this FUSE mount destroys an unreleased MINOR. The canonical record fell behind for the first time in the streak: DESIGN section 12 documents none of the ten endpoints. The mechanical blocker stays cleared and the content keeps getting better, but the loop has now diagnosed its own non-commit for nine straight audits and acted on it zero times.
